evals.prompt: I have a self-hosted Trigger.dev v4 instance running at trigger.mycompany.com. How do I set up a new Node.js project to use it? I need to configure both dev and production environments.
evals.expected_output: Should cover: login -a with URL, profiles, npx trigger init, trigger.config.ts, TRIGGER_SECRET_KEY formats (tr_dev_xxx, tr_prod_xxx), TRIGGER_API_URL, .env setup
expectations: Shows both tr_dev_xxx and tr_prod_xxx key formats', 'type': 'content_check
